##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/get-budget-parent-plan-detail 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/get-budget-parent-plan-detail 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于查询智能费控预算方案详情，包含预算方案基础信息和相关配置项。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":null}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"planSeqId","required":true,"exampleValue":"100","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数


## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{}
```
### 调用成功的响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "budgetParentPlanSeqId": 100,
        "budgetName": "测试预算方案导入",
        "budgetStartDate": "2024-01-01",
        "budgetEndDate": "2026-12-31",
        "budgetDimension": "3",
        "budgetState": "1",
        "eventIds": [
            1
        ],
        "budgetPlanId": "test001",
        "budgetOrgs": [
            2
        ],
        "budgetSubs": [
            3
        ],
        "budgetApproveTime": "NONE",
        "needPostAccount": "0",
        "allowExternalSystemBill": "0",
        "allowMonthOrderBudgetOccupy": "0",
        "budgetRangeFixed": "0"
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```
### 调用失败的响应报文
```json
{
    "returnCode": "E0001",
    "success": false,
    "message": "业务错误: 当前预算方案不存在，请检查输入内容"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为接口调用成功状态， true为成功，其余都是失败
| 常见报错|
| --- |
| 当前预算方案不存在，请检查输入内容|

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/get-budget-parent-plan-detail

接口描述

本接口适用于查询智能费控预算方案详情，包含预算方案基础信息和相关配置项。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":null}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"planSeqId","required":true,"exampleValue":"100","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid"}}]}]}

错误码说明

sucess为接口调用成功状态， true为成功，其余都是失败

常见报错
当前预算方案不存在，请检查输入内容
body.menuLevelName: 开发文档/智能费控/预算
